meta.title: Why Is The US Air Force Buying The New F 15 EX?
meta.description: The U.S. Air Force just started taking deliveries on Boeing's new F-15EX, but why invest in new "old" fighters in this era of stealth jets like the F-35 and F-22? Here's everything you need to know.
